item.title: Version 1.3
item.description:
• Custom Folder destination — pick any folder on your Mac (NAS, RAID, internal drive); date folders still auto-created inside
  • Light mode contrast overhaul — deeper blue and purple across all UI elements, ring, pills, and queue rows
  • Smooth scrolling — all panels use AppKit-backed momentum scrolling with elastic bounce
  • Speed graph instant start — appears when a transfer begins instead of after 10–15 seconds
  • History panel now resets at the broadcast-day cutoff instead of a fixed 24 hours
  • Destination tabs have a sliding pill animation, hover states, and full-area click targets
  • Stale path detection — orange warning on launch if the chosen custom folder is missing or unmounted

item.title: Version 1.4
item.description:
• Sparkle auto-update — existing users will receive this and all future updates automatically
  • Custom date filter — pick any date from a graphical calendar or type MM/DD/YYYY
  • Debug mode — new toggle in Advanced reveals the Log panel and Dry Run toggle
  • Daily log rotation — logs roll over each day and are kept for 7 days
  • Transfer speed fix — eliminated a near-100% hang on large card ingests
  • Destination path preview updates dynamically with your actual folder name and date format

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
• Project scaffold — customisable folder templates auto-created for every project
  • Date range filter — ingest files from a specific date range, not just today
  • Inline folder rename — rename project folders directly from the app
  • Project folder popover — new popover with scaffold preview before creating

item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
• XMP sidecar support — color labels, ratings, and metadata from Photo Mechanic, Lightroom, and Capture One now transfer with your photos automatically
  • Up to 30× faster transfer start on large photo cards — batch stat pre-fetch replaces thousands of individual shell calls
  • Speed graph fixed — appears immediately when copying starts instead of staying blank
  • Completion sound fixed — no more echo or stutter on large transfers
  • Phase timing in logs — every run records how long scanning, building, and copying took for easier debugging

item.title: Version 1.4.3
item.description:
• Progress bar now tracks bytes transferred, not file count — no more stalling at 93% on large clips
  • ETA is now calculated from a rolling 20-second speed window — no more estimates that tick upward or jump around
  • Speed chart no longer freezes mid-transfer when switching copy phases
  • Transfer progress snaps to 100% the moment copying finishes, not when the process fully exits
  • Today's session GB now shows the correct amount (was always showing 0 due to a byte-size calculation bug in the ingest script)
  • Script fallback: if the fast Perl file-size pass fails silently, the engine automatically retries with direct stat calls so bytes are always tracked

item.title: Version 1.4.4
item.description:
• Session stats fixed — fresh installs now show zero GB instead of phantom numbers from the demo run
  • Onboarding memory — SSD and project folder chosen during setup now carry over to the first real ingest
  • Settings close on outside tap — click anywhere outside the settings panel to dismiss it
  • About page — fits without scrolling; License Terms and Privacy Policy links updated
  • Active zone text — content can no longer overflow outside the ring, even with long card names or paths
  • Spotlight indexing — app now appears in CMD+Space immediately after a fresh install

item.title: Version 1.4.5
item.description: • Day-of-week date folders — new date format option creates folders named Monday through Sunday instead of a date code (e.g. Friday instead of 260516)

item.title: Version 1.4.6
item.description: • Custom folder fix — footage now lands directly in the date folder (e.g. Friday/) instead of creating an extra clips subfolder inside your custom destination

item.title: Version 1.4.7
item.description:
• Failed ingest badge — cancelled or errored ingests now show a persistent orange warning strip until the card is successfully re-ingested
  • Low disk space warning — live warning appears in the ring if the destination has less than 20% headroom for the transfer
  • Speed accuracy — cancelled transfers no longer contribute inflated MB/s readings to the session average
  • Accurate session speed — now uses weighted average so large and small cards are fairly combined
  • Log version fixed — log entries now show the real app version instead of v1.0
  • Scaffold log cleanup — project folder scaffold only logs when folders are actually new

item.title: Version 1.4.9
item.description:
• Card nickname memory — CardRunner now remembers each card by its Volume UUID. Insert a known card and the label field auto-fills instantly — no typing required. A green badge confirms the card is recognised; a subtle badge flags new cards so operators know to name them.
  • Known card badge — shows the matched card name (e.g. Xavier A-CAM) inline next to the card label toggle
  • macOS 14 + 15 compatibility — app now runs on Sonoma and Sequoia in addition to Tahoe. Older macOS gets a solid dark gradient instead of glass
  • Bug fixes — 20+ stability and edge-case fixes across the ingest pipeline, manifest pruning, rsync error handling, and date validation

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
• Bundled GNU rsync 3.4.3 for dramatically faster transfers
  • Instant card detection via mount notifications
  • Full 7-color Finder tag picker
  • Auto-ingest starts OFF at launch
  • Update check on every app open
  • Fixed empty-timestamp log entries
  • Eject retry logic for Spotlight race condition

item.title: Version 1.6.0
item.description:
• Folder colors now use Apple's Customize Folder format — folders actually change color in Finder instead of just showing a dot label
  • New: Project Scaffold folders can now have an optional subfolder (e.g. Footage / A-Camera)
  • Fix: Ingest Order setting now saves correctly when changed mid-session with a preset active
  • Fix: Inserting a second card while the date picker is open no longer drops the first card
  • Fix: Date retry scan now spaces attempts 1 second apart and clears spinner on cancel
  • Fix: Multi-date transfers now report correct date-skipped file count in logs
  • Fix: Trailing comma in date list no longer silently injects today's files

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
• Native copy engine — Finder-speed transfers using Apple's own copy path; rsync removed entirely
  • Data durability — files are now flushed to disk before CardRunner reports safe to eject
  • Duplicate filename protection — GoPro chaptered cards and Sony dual-slot cameras now preserve all clips instead of silently overwriting
  • Pre-flight space check — instant refusal if the destination won't fit the card instead of failing halfway
  • Auto-eject now blocked when verification detects corruption
  • License check now runs at most once every 7 days — faster launches and fully offline-safe for 14 days
  • Fixed a thread race in the cancel handler that could cause missed cancellations on multi-card sessions
  • Fixed destination path doubling when re-selecting a custom folder
  • Card de-duplication now uses Volume UUID — Untitled cards no longer confuse the queue
  • Security hardening — removed unnecessary library-validation entitlement
